name: Pear Walnut Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in vanilla; then egg. Beat until smooth.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and baking soda. Add to butter mixture alternately with sour cream. Mix just to blend after each addition. Fold in pears. Spread in an 8-inch greased square pan.
3. Mix brown sugar, cinnamon, and soft butter until well combined. Stir in the chopped walnuts. Sprinkle nut topping evenly over the cake.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until top is well-browned and a toothpick comes out clean. Cut into squares and serve warm or at room temperature.
